title: The Purple Monster Strikes
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Fred C. Brannon
writer: Royal K. Cole, Albert DeMond, Basil Dickey
actors: Dennis Moore, Linda Stirling, Roy Barcroft
plot: A Martian spacecraft crash-lands near the observatory of Cyrus Layton, designer of Earth's first spaceship. The survivor, forerunner of an invasion, can assume the form of any earthman. Calling himself the "purple monster," the hu...
